## Summary

Describe the requested change in a few sentences.

## Why

Explain the practical problem this would solve.

## Scope

List the documents, surfaces, or repositories this would affect.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the requested wording, rule, or brand decision.

## Notes

Include constraints, examples, or links to related discussions if useful.
